name: cp_vstart_vl_noop
goal: Test vd not updated when vstart >= vl
description: Test that all instructions obey not updating the vd register when vstart >= vl, including tail agnostic behavior
expectation: Run a vector arithmetic instruction with lmul=1, vd != vs2 != vs1, set vstart and vl to zero. Set ta={0/1}. lmul=1 and distinct registers simplifies testing without loss of generality.
spec: vstart >= vl means no elements written
